name: Packet closeout + runtime lock (code)
description: Preserve the closed packet decisions and restate the canonical OpenCode v1 runtime lock inside this planning pack.
acceptance_criteria: The pack preserves one canonical v1 runtime surface for `OpenCode` and lists deferred surfaces explicitly.
Install, auth, provider, and maintainer-smoke prerequisites are captured without editing downstream repo paths.
C1 receives explicit locked inputs for wrapper and manifest planning.
start_checklist: git checkout feat/opencode-cli-onboarding && git pull --ff-only
Read `plan.md`, `tasks.json`, `session_log.md`, `C0-spec.md`, and the kickoff prompt.
Set `C0-code` to `in_progress` in `docs/project_management/next/opencode-cli-onboarding/tasks.json` on the orchestration branch.
Add a START entry to `session_log.md`; commit docs with `docs: start C0-code`.
Create the task branch and worktree: `git worktree add -b oco-c0-closeout-code wt/oco-c0-closeout-code feat/opencode-cli-onboarding`.
Do not edit `tasks.json` or `session_log.md` from the worktree.
end_checklist: Validate the pack with `jq . docs/project_management/next/opencode-cli-onboarding/tasks.json` and a quick markdown review of touched files.
Commit worktree changes on `oco-c0-closeout-code`.
Outside the worktree, ensure the task branch contains the new commit; do not merge into `feat/opencode-cli-onboarding` yet.
Checkout `feat/opencode-cli-onboarding`; update `tasks.json` to `completed`; add an END entry to `session_log.md`; commit docs with `docs: finish C0-code`.
Remove worktree `wt/oco-c0-closeout-code`.

No downstream repo code, manifests, or specs are edited.

name: Packet closeout + runtime lock (integration)

acceptance_criteria: C0 records one locked runtime surface plus a deferred-surface list and explicit handoff inputs for C1.
The pack identifies any remaining blockers that must stay open before wrapper planning starts.
The result is still docs-only and confined to this directory.

name: Wrapper crate + manifest-root planning (code)

The pack defines the expected `cli_manifests/opencode/` artifact inventory and ownership model.
The result explicitly excludes `crates/agent_api/` planning beyond inputs handed to C2.

Redaction, bounded payloads, and completion-finality obligations are called out.
